statement: In every magma, Equation 1928 (`x = (y * (y * x)) * (z * y)`) implies Equation 3236 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * y) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0813
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op y x)) (op z y))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) y) u)
